name: Order
description: Champions of Order believe discipline and unity forge unbreakable power.

name: Entropy
description: Entropy champions embrace change, destruction, and the inevitable collapse of all systems.

name: Knowledge
description: Knowledge champions seek mastery through learning, foresight, and calculated decisions.

name: Power
description: Champions of Power believe domination is earned through superior force and presence.

name: Void
description: Void champions draw strength from the unknown and the spaces between existence.

name: Balance
description: Balance champions maintain harmony between creation and destruction.
